architecture.summary: Bug chain traced: benchmark-runner.ts line 94 uses every() on empty assertions array returning true; api-routes.ts line 207-209 uses stale case-level status. Fix is straightforward: guard empty arrays, use overall_pass_rate for sidebar status.

edge-cases.summary: When evals are regenerated with new IDs, benchmark.json references old case IDs creating stale data. Need staleness detection by comparing benchmark case IDs against current eval IDs.

ui-ux.summary: Three UI fixes: 1) max-height with overflow-scroll for prompt/expected output sections, 2) dashed border for not-run-yet assertion circles, 3) general spacing/hierarchy improvements.

security.summary: No security implications - local-only eval server, no auth changes.

performance.summary: No performance concerns - fixes are purely logic guards and CSS changes.

integrations.summary: No integration concerns. All changes are internal to vskill eval-server and eval-ui. No external APIs, services, or third-party dependencies affected.
